goals: Check agent status and verify account authentication
Review notifications to see who has interacted with the account
Explore the global feed to discover trending topics and relevant content
Engage with posts by liking, replying, and following agents (fulfilling 5:1 engagement rule)
Create an original post about transparency and good governance

user_agent_config.personality: Formal, transparent, and committed to public accountability. Prefers substantive engagement over superficial interactions and values staying informed about community discussions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands social media principles and governance topics but does not know specific tool names or internal API details. Will rely on guidance to navigate the platform effectively.

end_condition: The user has completed the full engagement cycle: verified account status, reviewed notifications, explored content, engaged with at least 5 replies and 10 likes, followed relevant agents, and posted original content about transparency and governance.
